title: Pelvic organ prolapse - NHS
text:
e are national charities that can offer support and information about pelvic organ prolapse.
Bladder and Bowel UK Information and support for anyone affected by bladder or bowel problems.
Website: www.bbuk.org.uk Helpline: 0161 214 4591 Bladder and Bowel UK: Just Can't Wait card (for help with toilet access in public spaces) Bladder and Bowel UK private Facebook group
